---
title: "Security Is Pervasive"
date: "2025-01-01"
order: 4
fig-cap-location: bottom
categories: [ccde-written]
---

```{=html}
<style>
figcaption { text-align: center; }
</style>
```


## Overview

*Next: [Reference Architecture Models and Frameworks](reference-architecture-models-and-frameworks.qmd)*
